name: CBRE GROUP, INC.
summary: PART I . Company Overview CBRE is the worlds largest commercial real estate services and investments firm (based on 2025 revenue). We derive competitive advantage from our considerable scale and ability to offer integrated solutions for real estate investors and occupiers in more than 100 countries. We are global market leaders in most of our business lines and drive significant growth by helping clients optimize real estate costs, value, investment returns and workplace experiences.
